title: VistaProtect - Premium Privacy Screen Filter & Anti Blue Light Protector for Laptop Computers (11.6" inches)
features: Premium 2-in-1 privacy & anti-blue light screen filter: Expertly crafted to keep your monitor screen's information confidential while blocking 90% of detrimental blue light emissions. Enjoy freedom from insomnia, eye discomfort, and headaches, all while maintaining screen privacy.
18% brighter than alternatives: These privacy screens surpass others in brightness and clarity, making them perfectly compatible with today's high-resolution computer screens.

Two installation methods included: Choose to permanently fix the privacy filter to your computer using clear adhesive strips or opt for tab holders for easy removal when you are not using the privacy filter.

Fits 11.6" laptop screens: Diagonal: 11.6" inches - Width: 256 mm - Height: 144mm - Aspect ratio: 16:9 Widescreen. Compare your screen size against the last photo. Please reach out to us if you're uncertain
Gift Included: We've included a free webcam cover as a gift. Cover your webcam when not in use and prevent hackers from spying on you.
description: Product Description Premium Privacy Filter & Anti Blue Light Screen Protector for Computer Laptops Protect yourself from visual hacking! The VistaProtect Privacy Filters ensure that only you can see your computer screen. Designed in Switzerland and made from premium materials, our privacy screen filters are engineered to ensure that any information on your computer screen remains private. Easy installation The filter is easy to attach and remove when not in use. If you need permanent privacy, you can secure it to your screen. Gift Included We've included a webcam cover as a gift. Cover your webcam when not in use and prevent hackers from spying on you. Designed in Switzerland Our privacy filters are designed in Switzerland and undergo meticulous inspection ensure the highest quality.
